data.title: Inventor creates SPOT UP app for restaurant reviews. Originated in Victorville, Calif. on July 24, 2025.
data.description: A resident of Victorville, California who works as a restaurant general manager shared their inspiration for creating a new app called SPOT UP. The app is designed to help users locate food establishments they have seen on social media or visited previously. The inventor proposed this idea in Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, envisioning a tool that streamlines the search for nearby or distant food spots. The app's aim is to provide a convenient way for users to track down and explore new dining options, enhancing their overall restaurant experience.

data.title: Inventor from Jamaica, N.Y., creates remote-controlled laser leveling tool called AUTOMATIC LASER.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Jamaica, NY shared his creation of the AUTOMATIC LASER, a remote-controlled laser leveling tool. The inventor, who works as a carpenter and sheetrock installer/finisher, explained that he developed the device to streamline his work process. With this invention, users can now operate the laser level from a distance, eliminating the need to constantly step away.

data.title: ETH outperforms BTC in US spot ETFs as BTC ETFs lose $285M, per Swissblock research. ETH poised for long-term success.
data.description: In the realm of US spot ETFs, the comparison between Ether and Bitcoin has sparked significant discussion. According to Swissblock research, there is growing anticipation that Ether (ETH) may emerge as the victorious contender over the long haul. This analysis suggests that ETH could potentially outperform Bitcoin in the US ETF market.
Brent Crude futures settle at $69.18/bbl, up 67 cents, 0.98%

data.title: Chef iQ launches iQ MiniOven, a new smart kitchen appliance to simplify cooking for modern chefs.
data.description: Introducing the iQ MiniOven by CHEF iQ, a cutting-edge smart kitchen appliance tailored for today's home chefs. Launched in New York on July 24, 2025, this miniature culinary powerhouse is set to revolutionize cooking with its advanced technology. The iQ MiniOven promises to streamline the cooking process, boasting impressive features to enhance efficiency and convenience in the kitchen. As the latest offering from CHEF iQ, renowned for their innovative kitchen solutions, the iQ MiniOven is poised to become a must-have for home cooks looking to elevate their culinary experience.

data.title: Garden Stage Limited is offering $4.2 million in registered direct offering for 38,406,345 ordinary shares at a purchase price of $0.11 per share.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Garden Stage Limited (NASDAQ: GSIW) disclosed a new agreement with multiple investors for the acquisition and trade of a total of 38,406,345 ordinary shares of the company, valued at $0.0001 per share, or pre-funded warrants at the same price. This transaction took place in a registered direct offering where each share was sold at $.11. For pre-funded warrants, the cost was also $.11 per share, excluding the exercise price of $0.001 per share.

data.title: $1.5B USDtb stablecoin launched in US by Ethena Labs and Anchorage Digital, following recent stablecoin law passage.
data.description: Ethena Labs is set to introduce their UDStb in the United States, just days after the nation's legislators approved a significant stablecoin legislation.

data.title: Bitcoin, currently undergoing consolidation, anticipated to surge to $135,000 in an upcoming move.
data.description: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 15%, with more than 10 million people currently out of work. This sharp increase is due to the economic challenges brought by the global pandemic, leading to widespread job losses across various sectors. The government has announced measures to provide financial assistance to those affected by unemployment, including extending unemployment benefits and offering retraining programs to help individuals transition to new job opportunities. Despite these efforts, experts predict that it may take several years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the pandemic on the job market.

data.title: Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF (TSX: BAAA, BAAA.U) to issue distributions on Aug 15 to unitholders as per record on July 31, 2025.
data.description: Toronto-based Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF (TSX: BAAA, BAAA.U) has declared distributions that will be paid on August 15, 2025, to unitholders who are recorded as of July 31, 2025. The specific distribution details have not been provided within the limited information available. This announcement outlines the key dates for unitholders to take note of in relation to the upcoming distribution from the ETF.

data.title: Blue Ribbon Income Fund (TSX: RBN.UN) will distribute $0.04 per unit monthly from July to September 2025.
data.description: The Blue Ribbon Income Fund (TSX: RBN.UN) based in Toronto disclosed on July 24, 2025, that it will be distributing $0.04 per unit monthly for record dates spanning from July to September 2025.

data.title: INJ price surpasses $13 to aim for $15.71 resistance. Currently at $13.92 (+0.58% daily) after 14% spike.
data.description: The stock symbol INJ is currently trading at $13.92, representing a daily increase of 0.58%. The stock has shown strong bullish momentum, maintaining its recent surge of 14% and successfully breaking through important resistance levels from a technical standpoint.

data.title: Deltec Homes introduces Tranquility - a hurricane-ready home built for resilience and inspired living. New 360° model offers spacious design.
data.description: Deltec Homes has introduced their latest model, the 360° in Asheville, N.C., on July 24, 2025. This new design offers a combination of spaciousness, natural light, and exceptional durability. The unveiling comes amidst forecasts indicating an active 2025 hurricane season, with experts projecting an above-average number of major storms. Deltec Homes, renowned globally, stands at the forefront of innovative housing solutions.

data.title: Christian Dior reports strong performance in H1 2025 with revenue of €40B, profit of €9B, and free cash flow of €4B.
data.description: Strong performance was demonstrated in the first half of 2025, despite challenging conditions. The company reported revenue of €40 billion, with a profit from recurring operations reaching €9 billion. Additionally, a free cash flow of €4 billion was achieved during this period.
